== Notes for [[Item:Q99768|Q99768]] ==

https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Abba_ben_Ammi Rav Abba ben Rav Ammi ben Samuel (Hebrew: רב אבא בר אמי בן שמואל ; c. 799 - 872) was the Gaon of Pumbedita from 869 until his death in 872.

Born in about 799 to an affluent family. His grandfather, Rav Samuel ben Mar Mari was the Sura Gaon from 730-748 and a descendent of the Exilarchs.He studied under the previous Gaon, Mattithiah ha-Kohen, who appointed Rav Abba as his successor in 869. Rav Abba served as the Pumbedita Gaon for two years and was succeeded by Zemah ben Paltoi

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
67051AD7318A41EFBBFA9822EF79916C1CDA
geni:6000000000028908393

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
